name: Mill Road Shapes
tagline: Handcrafted performance boards from the Northern Rivers
bio: Shaping boards in the Northern Rivers since 2008. Specialising in high-performance shortboards and retro fish designs for the points and beach breaks of Northern NSW.

name: Southern Glass Co
tagline: Premium glassing and colour work for discerning surfers
tags: Expert glassing and finish work with a focus on colour tints and resin art. Working with shapers across Victoria and NSW.

name: Moonlight Glass
tagline: Resin art and custom glass for the modern surfer
tags: Boutique glass shop on the Gold Coast. Known for stunning resin tints and colour work that turns boards into art.

name: Channel Islands
tagline: World-class shortboards and longboards for every surfer
bio: One of the world's most recognised surfboard brands. Shaping boards for world champions and weekend warriors alike since 1969.
